name: Jill of All Trades
description: Epic Tediore class mod for Gaige the Mechromancer, centred on More Pep, The Better Half, and Smaller, Lighter, Faster. Focused on assault rifle performance.
notes: Its name is a gender-flipped take on the phrase 'Jack of all trades'.

special.description: At max level, boosts AR damage by 52% and AR magazine size by 59%.

abilities: +4 Smaller Lighter Faster Skil IEDIORE t j
